entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species being studied for susceptibility to iron chlorosis.

entities.name: IRON CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A condition characterized by the yellowing of leaves due to iron deficiency.

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: The lack of iron in the environment that causes chlorosis in plants.

entities.name: ICC5386
entities.description: A specific germplasm accession of chickpea that is highly susceptible to iron chlorosis.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The breeding process used to cross the susceptible accession with normal cultivars.

entities.name: FILIAL GENERATIONS
entities.description: The F2 and F3 generations examined to determine the inheritance of the trait.

entities.name: RECESSIVE GENE
entities.description: The single genetic element identified as controlling the susceptibility to iron chlorosis.

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The environment where the plant generations were grown and examined.
